problem: Why does biological neural computation use 20W while AI uses megawatts — what is different?
mechanism: DNA computing for massively parallel search
hypothesis: If DNA computing for massively parallel search is applied to what, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Benchmark on standard dataset with 3 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
